title: Rustic Roasted Canadian Bacon Skillet
description: A savory Canadian dish featuring crispy Canadian bacon, roasted to perfection in a terracotta dish with a hint of dark brown soft sugar, perfect for a brunch mood. This high-protein friendly recipe is sure to satisfy your cravings.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the dark brown soft sugar, salt, and black pepper.
Add the diced potatoes, onions, and bell peppers to the bowl and toss to coat with the sugar mixture.
Heat the olive oil in a large terracotta dish over medium-high heat.
Add the Canadian bacon to the dish and cook until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Remove the Canadian bacon from the dish and set aside.
Add the potato and vegetable mixture to the dish and cook until the potatoes are tender, about 10 minutes.
Create 6 wells in the potato mixture and crack an egg into each well.
Return the Canadian bacon to the dish and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 15 minutes, or until the eggs are cooked to your desired doneness.
Remove from the oven and serve hot.
